summary: Backend testing for RAW MATERIALS stock features - All 10 tests passed. Verified: 1) GET /api/raw-materials-new returns total_received, transferred_to_manufacturing, remaining_quantity fields, 2) POST /api/raw-materials-new/{id}/add-stock?quantity=N endpoint works correctly, 3) transferred_to_manufacturing increases when raw material is transferred via POST /api/warehouse-to-manufacturing
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: GET /api/raw-materials-new correctly adds total_received, transferred_to_manufacturing, remaining_quantity fields (lines 577-580)
Code review passed: POST /api/raw-materials-new/{id}/add-stock correctly increments both quantity and total_received (lines 631-639)
Code review passed: add-stock validates quantity > 0 and returns 404 for invalid material ID (lines 627-628)
Code review passed: POST /api/warehouse-to-manufacturing correctly increments transferred_to_manufacturing via $inc operator (lines 733-735)
Code review passed: add-stock creates inventory_movements record for audit trail (lines 643-651)
seed_data_creation: Created test raw material with prefix TEST_ for testing add-stock and transfer features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Raw materials stock features verified. Key endpoints: GET /api/raw-materials-new (returns stats fields: total_received, transferred_to_manufacturing, remaining_quantity), POST /api/raw-materials-new/{id}/add-stock?quantity=N (manual stock increase), POST /api/warehouse-to-manufacturing (transfer to manufacturing increases transferred_to_manufacturing). All features working correctly.
